message:
feat(config): add stealth config for detection mitigation (caam-bgz)

Add StealthConfig to SPMConfig with three opt-in features:

1. SwitchDelay: Random delays before profile switches complete
   - enabled, min_seconds, max_seconds, show_countdown

2. Cooldown: Waiting periods after accounts hit rate limits
   - enabled, default_minutes, track_limit_hits

3. Rotation: Smart profile selection algorithms
   - enabled, algorithm (smart|round_robin|random)

All features disabled by default (opt-in) for power users who want speed.
Includes validation rules and comprehensive tests.

Also fixes unused import in browser/urldetect.go.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
